body.title: CLOSED: Semantic palace search at sprint-ticket plan step
body.result: added memory_search step at Step 4 of sprint-ticket skill before inertia check
body.description:
Sprint-ticket Step 4 (plan review) runs without palace context specific to the ticket. A semantic search against Igor's palace at claim time would surface relevant architectural constraints and prior decisions before any code is written — the signal at decision time, not retrospectively.

Proposed shape: add a step to /sprint-ticket Step 4 (after inertia check, before infrastructure brief): call mcp__igor__memory_search(query=<ticket title + description summary>, limit=5), surface results as 'Related palace nodes:' block. If search returns nothing, proceed silently. Changes are additive — existing behavior unchanged when search is empty.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket (skill file text edit)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** one new step in sprint-ticket Step 4 only. Not changing the plan format, not adding new state, not gating on results.
**Test plan:** manually run sprint-ticket on a ticket tagged 'agent_datacenter'; verify relevant palace nodes (subsystem_index, architecture nodes) appear in the plan step without a manual memory_search call.
**Pass condition:** during plan review for T-cc-log-stop-hook-wire, palace nodes about CC logging or agent_datacenter appear automatically from the semantic search.
